what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-05, storing its identity, storage blob, MIME type, dimensions, authorship, and a source-attribution line.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id capital-raise/p-05, address image://design-source/capital-raise/p-05, channel design-source, path capital-raise/p-05, blob blob://b2:99a22a564304ad261e4b5b762e4149f2, mime image/jpeg, name p-05
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-05.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being a JPEG
A blob hash is present but no links or relationships are recorded
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter followed by a short plain-text body
Uses URI-style identifiers: image://design-source/... and blob://b2:...
Records provenance fields: source, author_session, created
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing or unprocessed image metadata
Empty links leave the asset disconnected from related records
No content description or alt text is provided
notes: A minimal ledger stub for a design-source JPEG in the capital-raise set, giving it a stable address and blob reference but no resolved dimensions or relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
Should links contain relationships to other capital-raise assets?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth source image; actual content is a sparse metadata record with unresolved dimensions and no relationships.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a specific source image in the design channel so it can be addressed, retrieved, and fused with other code/design substrates later.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable identity and storage reference for a single design image asset and marks it as design ground truth.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image 'capital-raise/p-05' with a B2 blob reference, zero dimensions, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog a source design image for the capital-raise set as ground truth for downstream fusion or reference.
